title: Inside India newsletter: The worst might not be over for Indian equities
summary_full: Indian equities plunged as the Iran war triggered a record wave of foreign investor sell‑offs. Experts warn the downturn may not be over yet.
summary_public: Indian equities plunged as the Iran war triggered a record wave of foreign investor sell‑offs. Experts warn the downturn may not be over yet.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran war triggered a record wave of foreign investor sell-offs
